case_title: RICHARD G MARINI JR. VS. ROB BRANDENSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO NOV-18-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS GOING TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO ADD CORRECT PARTY TO THE CLAIM AND RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $65.00 SERVED AUG-25-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDENSTEIN, ROB OF TRINITY MANAGEMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (DISMISSAL AS TO DEFENDANT "ROB BRANDENSTEIN" ONLY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINI JR., RICHARD G AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDENSTEIN, ROB OF TRINITY MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ--CORPORATE LEGAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAM. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,454.00 FILED BY MARINI JR., RICHARD G AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING CLAIM TO DISMISS DEFENDANT ROB BRANDENSTEIN & ADD DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINI JR., RICHARD G
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD FILED BY DEFENDANT BRANDENSTEIN, ROB OF TRINITY MANAGEMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,454.00 FILED BY MARINI JR., RICHARD G AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDENSTEIN, ROB OF TRINITY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARINI JR., RICHARD G IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
